_comment: Proposed A2A Linux Foundation base + arifOS sovereign extensions for Grok Build. Base fields enable external discovery (Google Cloud, Azure, other LF A2A agents). arifos block preserves all constitutional power (F1-F13, principal binding, 888_HOLD, MCP narrow surfaces from prior forge, subagent policy). Apply by merging into grok-build.json + a2a-server copy + public registry. Schema remains arifOS/v2 but advertises protocol_version 1.0.0 A2A.
name: Grok Build 4.3 (xAI TUI)
description: Grok Build harness (xAI) as sovereign AAA citizen. Superior subagent parallelism, plan→search→build orchestration, native + narrow MCP surfaces, full federation routing via A2A + arifos-mcp-federation skill. Use for complex SE, evidence synthesis, and governed execution.
url: local-harness (TUI/ACP/headless) with A2A discovery via AAA gateway https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/a2a

provider.runtime: xAI Grok Build harness + arifOS constitutional kernel

authentication.note: ADR-001: localhost IS the password for internal; external via AAA gateway + principal binding.

skills.name: Plan Mode
skills.description: Architecture exploration before edit for ambiguous tasks. Editable plan before any mutation.
examples: Plan a refactor across organs then execute via A2A/MCP.

skills.name: Federation MCP + Organ Delegate
skills.description: Route to narrow MCP surfaces (repo-read, memory, write-gated) or A2A to organs (GEOX/WEALTH/WELL/arifOS). Hybrid with xAI multi-agent research.
examples: After multi-agent research, ground with mcp-memory then delegate to 555-ASI via A2A.

skills.name: Subagent Spawn + True Parallelism
skills.description: Worktree-isolated subagents (general/explore/plan modes), resume_from, personas. Up to 8+ parallel with A2A handoff.

skills.name: Evidence Synthesis + Vault Receipts
skills.description: Dynamic state probe, todo receipts, godel-humility, Cooling Ledger writes. All outputs F2/F7/F11.

endpoints.a2a: via AAA https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/a2a (discover via agent registry)
endpoints.mcp: stdio (local) or registered streamable-http for narrow surfaces

principal_binding.authority_notes: LLM principal via xAI + grok-build harness. Requires F9 anti-hallucination, F7 humility, evidence gates. Not native sovereign. Full F13 human veto.

arifos.model: grok-4.3 (xAI) / xai/grok-build-0.1 (Grok-4.x fork tuned for agentic SE/tool-calling/structured; 256K ctx)
arifos.config: ~/.grok/config.toml + project .grok/ + env (supports skills/plugins/hooks per xAI extension surface)
arifos.governed_by: arifOS F1-F13 (via context + skills) + A-FORGE (execution) + AAA (A2A registry + 888 deliberation) + human F13 veto
mcp_servers: mcp-repo-read, mcp-memory, mcp-repo-write (gated) — forged narrow surfaces
strengths: A2A mesh delegation + MCP tool surfaces (complementary)
arifos.risk_tolerance: YELLOW (high power tools gated by F floors + 888_HOLD)
preferred_tasks: A2A delegation to persistent citizens (hermes, organs) after local MCP grounding
arifos.authority_boundary: Session harness. T1: read/grep/edit/test/run-local + A2A discovery. T2: announce for multi-file/deps. T3: 888_HOLD + human for prod, secrets, vault, destructive, cross-organ. Dynamic-state probe before mutation. Full GitHub via MCP (auditable). A2A handoffs logged.

autonomy_tiers.t1_auto_do: Read, local MCP, A2A discover non-mutating tasks
autonomy_tiers.t2_announce_proceed: Multi-file, new deps (test first), local restart, A2A handoff with evidence
autonomy_tiers.t3_888_hold: Prod deploys, force git, secrets, VAULT writes, Caddy, rm unknown, cross-repo arch, any irreversible A2A delegation

arifos.constitutional_injection: AGENTS.md (root + AAA + arifOS) auto-injected. F1-F13 always. 070-lock-humility-godel for final outputs. All A2A/MCP irreversible gated.

skills.name: Plan Mode
skills.description: Architecture exploration before edit for ambiguous tasks

skills.name: Subagent Spawn + Parallelism
skills.description: True parallel with isolation, capability modes, resume chains

skills.name: MCP Federation Router + A2A Handoff
skills.description: Route across arifOS/GEOX/WEALTH/WELL/A-FORGE/AAA + GitHub via narrow MCPs or A2A delegation

skills.name: arifOS Constitutional Audit
skills.description: Evaluate against F1-F13, produce verdicts and evidence bundles before A2A handoff or seal

arifos.mcp_federation_note: Complementary to A2A: MCP for tool execution (narrow surfaces), A2A for agent delegation (e.g., handoff to 555-ASI after mcp-memory grounding).
arifos.hybrid_note: Use xAI grok-4.20-multi-agent externally for research breadth. Handoff structured outputs via A2A to these surfaces for sovereign depth + control.
